prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京体育大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约8689名、8819名、12191名、9938名、11105名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023年出现明显后移至12 191名，2024年短暂回升至9938名，2025年再次后移至11105名，近两年波动幅度约1100–2200名，基准位次约11105名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划持续缩减： 2021年27人、2022年21人、2023年22人、2024年14人、2025年11人；2026年计划回升至18人，较2025年扩招约63.6%，名额明显增加，对报考竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2025年第180名、2026年第177名，属体育类顶尖院校，近年排名稳中有升；2 026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及排球联赛主场争议等校园管理事件；抖音热度为高热（总排名第18/106），短视频平台曝光量大；未见明显投档断档记录。综合来看，声誉偏 负面可能轻微抑制报考热情，但高热曝光亦吸引关注，整体影响中性偏谨慎；体育学为北京体育大学核心优势学科（第五轮学科评估应为A+级别），与该校体育 类、运动康复、运动人体科学等招生专业高度关联，对体育特长生及有志于体育事业的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在津招生专业涉及新闻传播学类（社会热 度明显劝退）、外国语言文学类（一般观望）、工商管理/旅游管理类（明显劝退）、心理学类（平稳）、数据科学（计算机类，偏热推荐）等，整体专业热度分化；天津市2026 年高考报名总人数约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；北京体育大学位于北京市，与天津市毗邻，对天津考生具有天然的地缘吸引力；该校在天津招生占比近年约0.3%–0.5%（2025年全国总计划约598人，天津12人），属中等偏低 水平，但京津同城效应使报考热度相对稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11105名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招至18人（缓解竞争）、天津考生总数增长约14%（加剧竞争 ）、声誉偏负面与抖音高热相互对冲等因素，较2025年小幅后移，反映扩招带来的名额增加效应被考生规模扩大部 分抵消；位次区间14345–15345名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14845名，区间14345–15345名。位次在此区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报（数据科学与大数据技术、网络与新媒体），一档专业（马克思主义理论、应用心理学） 作为冲刺；位次优于区间下限（<14345名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>15345名）建议以三档专业保底（汉语国际教育、康复物理治疗）。注意该校体育类特 色专业（如运动康复、运动人体科学等）虽未在2025年major_score_details中体现，但2026年招生计划中有新增，报考时可重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing Sport University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 8689, 8819, 12191, 9938, and 11105 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. In 2023, there was a significant decline to 12191, followed by a brief recovery to 9938 in 2024, and another decline to 11105 in 2025. The fluctuation range in recent two years is about 1100–2200 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 11105. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin's comprehensive category has been continuously shrinking: 27 students in 2021, 21 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 11 in 2025. The 2026 plan is set to increase to 18 students, an expansion of about 63.6% compared to 2025, significantly increasing the number of spots, which helps alleviate competition for admission.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 180th in 2025 and 177th in 2026, making it a top-tier sports institution with a steadily rising ranking in recent years. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving campus management incidents such as the volleyball league home court controversy. On Douyin (TikTok), it has high popularity (ranked 18th out of 106 overall), with significant exposure on short video platforms. No obvious admission gaps or discontinuities have been observed. Overall, the slightly negative reputation may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, but the high popularity also attracts attention, resulting in a neutral to cautious overall impact. Sports science is the core advantageous discipline of Beijing Sport University (likely A+ level in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), highly related to its enrollment majors such as sports, sports rehabilitation, and sports human science, which strongly attract sports-specialized students and those aspiring to careers in sports.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Tianjin include Journalism and Communication (socially hot, clearly discouraged), Foreign Languages and Literature (generally wait-and-see), Business Administration/Tourism Management (clearly discouraged), Psychology (stable), Data Science (computer-related, slightly hot and recommended), etc., showing overall polarization in major popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Tianjin college entrance examination is approximately 82,000, an increase of about 14% compared to 71,938 in 2025, intensifying overall competition due to the expanded candidate pool. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, adjacent to Tianjin, providing natural geographical appeal to Tianjin candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Tianjin in recent years is about 0.3%–0.5% (2025 national total plan about 598, Tianjin 12), which is moderately low, but the Beijing-Tianjin same-city effect keeps application enthusiasm relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11105, the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan to 18 students (alleviating competition), the 14% increase in the total number of Tianjin candidates (intensifying competition), and the offsetting effects of slightly negative reputation and high Douyin popularity, there will be a slight decline compared to 2025, reflecting that the increase in spots due to expansion is partially offset by the expanded candidate pool. The ranking range is 14345–15345.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 14845, with a range of 14345–15345. Candidates within this range are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Data Science and Big Data Technology, Network and New Media), with Tier 1 majors (Marxist Theory, Applied Psychology) as reach options. Candidates with rankings better than the lower limit (<14345) can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>15345) are advised to use Tier 3 majors (Chinese International Education, Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) as safety options. Note that the university's sports-specific majors (such as Sports Rehabilitation, Sports Human Science, etc.) are not reflected in the 2025 major_score_details, but new additions are expected in the 2026 enrollment plan, so candidates should pay attention to them when applying.
